Our Services

Professional tire-shop solutions for every need

Tire Replacement

Expert tire selection and installation for Louisville's varied driving conditions.

Learn More →

Flat Tire Repair

Reliable flat fixes that get you back on Louisville roads quickly.

Learn More →

Wheel Alignment

Precision alignments to combat Louisville's pothole season.

Learn More →

Tire Rotation

Regular rotations extend tire life on Louisville's varied road surfaces.

Learn More →

TPMS Service

Keep your tire pressure monitoring system working through Kentucky's temperature swings.

Learn More →

Winter Tire Services

Prepare for Kentucky's icy bridges and sudden snowstorms.

Learn More →

Custom Wheel Installation

Proper fitment for Louisville's car enthusiasts and practical upgrades.

Learn More →
Summit Tire Shop

Trusted tire shop professionals serving Louisville, KY and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
